_comment: Non-content-specific hints for the pipeline. A new upload folder needs NO code changes; at most tweak these knobs. Nothing here names any specific memory, place, or person.
_openaiNote: provider 'ollama' = local open-source model (free, no key, needs ~2-5GB disk). provider 'openai' = any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (Groq/OpenRouter/etc.) via OPENAI_API_KEY + optional OPENAI_BASE_URL override. Both go through the same code path.
